title: Team Project Problem
description: A teammate keeps missing deadlines. What will you do?

choices.text: Talk to them firmly and demand improvement.
choices.outcomeText: You were direct and firm, showing accountability.

choices.text: Offer help and ask if they are facing issues.
choices.outcomeText: You showed empathy and teamwork.

choices.text: Report the issue to your project lead.
choices.outcomeText: You escalated the issue, avoiding direct conflict.

choices.text: Do their work yourself to meet deadlines.
choices.outcomeText: You ensured progress but encouraged poor performance.

title: Client Change Request
description: A client wants big changes at the last moment. What will you do?

choices.text: Say yes immediately to keep them happy.
choices.outcomeText: You put client first but risk project efficiency.

choices.text: Explain impact and suggest better alternatives.
choices.outcomeText: You balanced client needs with project limits.

choices.text: Firmly say it’s not possible in current timeline.
choices.outcomeText: You showed assertiveness but risk client relations.

choices.text: Call your team to brainstorm quick solutions.
choices.outcomeText: You showed teamwork and leadership.

title: Pitching a New Idea
description: You have a new idea but fear resistance. What will you do?

choices.text: Confidently present with data and logic.
choices.outcomeText: You showed analysis and confidence.

choices.text: Share tentatively and ask for feedback.
choices.outcomeText: You encouraged collaboration and creativity.

choices.text: Keep it to yourself for now.
choices.outcomeText: You stayed cautious but missed opportunity.

choices.text: Ask a trusted colleague first for advice.
choices.outcomeText: You took a thoughtful and careful step.

title: Overtime Request
description: Your boss asks you to work late again. What will you do?

choices.text: Agree without hesitation.
choices.outcomeText: You showed dedication but risk burnout.

choices.text: Explain politely you need rest.
choices.outcomeText: You set healthy boundaries.

choices.text: Ask if the work can wait until tomorrow.
choices.outcomeText: You balanced commitment with practicality.

choices.text: Offer partial help but not full overtime.
choices.outcomeText: You compromised to support the team.

title: Missed Deadline
description: You missed a deadline due to unexpected issues. What will you do?

choices.text: Apologize and promise to do better.
choices.outcomeText: You took responsibility.

choices.text: Blame external issues.
choices.outcomeText: You avoided blame but risk trust.

choices.text: Give a clear report on what went wrong.
choices.outcomeText: You were transparent and professional.

choices.text: Stay silent and hope it is ignored.
choices.outcomeText: You avoided conflict but hurt accountability.

title: Office Conflict
description: Two coworkers argue loudly during work. What will you do?

choices.text: Step in and calm them down.
choices.outcomeText: You showed leadership and empathy.

choices.text: Ignore and continue working.
choices.outcomeText: You stayed focused but missed teamwork.

choices.text: Report the fight to HR.
choices.outcomeText: You chose a formal solution.

choices.text: Support one side openly.
choices.outcomeText: You worsened the conflict but showed loyalty.

title: Tight Presentation
description: You are asked to present in 10 minutes. What will you do?

choices.text: Confidently present with what you know.
choices.outcomeText: You showed confidence under pressure.

choices.text: Ask for more time.
choices.outcomeText: You tried to prepare better but risked impression.

choices.text: Share the stage with a teammate.
choices.outcomeText: You showed teamwork and adaptability.

choices.text: Decline politely.
choices.outcomeText: You avoided stress but missed opportunity.

title: New Colleague
description: A new colleague seems lost on their first day. What will you do?

choices.text: Offer to guide them around.
choices.outcomeText: You showed empathy and teamwork.

choices.text: Let them figure things out.
choices.outcomeText: You encouraged independence but risked isolation.

choices.text: Ask your manager to assist them.
choices.outcomeText: You delegated responsibility.

choices.text: Just smile and greet politely.
choices.outcomeText: You were friendly but not very helpful.

title: Workplace Gossip
description: Coworkers start gossiping about someone. What will you do?

choices.text: Join in the gossip.
choices.outcomeText: You bonded socially but risked professionalism.

choices.text: Stay silent and listen.
choices.outcomeText: You avoided trouble but didn’t stop negativity.

choices.text: Speak up and stop the gossip.
choices.outcomeText: You showed integrity and assertiveness.

choices.text: Change the subject casually.
choices.outcomeText: You kept things positive without conflict.
